copy-code advisory classes found: 91 (advisory only, no score impact)

repair-hint and receipt convention are documented

dimensions.name: Context economy and agent instructions
evidence: root README routes to the right docs

explicit cache marker plus narrow per-package target found

items.ci_command: jankurai audit . --mode ratchet --baseline target/jankurai/accepted-baseline.json --json target/jankurai/repo-score.json --md target/jankurai/repo-score.md

jankurai proofmark rust . --obligations target/jankurai/proofbind/obligations.json

findings.problem: `Code shape and semantic surface` scored 0 below the standard floor of 85
findings.agent_fix: split large or ambiguous authored code into smaller semantic modules with focused tests
evidence: most code files stay under 300 LOC

findings.problem: generated zone is not protected strongly enough against hand edits
findings.agent_fix: add `agent/generated-zones.toml`, require generated/do-not-edit markers, and route repairs to the source contract
evidence: generated zone declaration `agent/sandbox-lanes.toml` targets protected source or control-plane code

findings.problem: missing trailing ZYAL_ARM sentinel
findings.agent_fix: append `ZYAL_ARM RUN_FOREVER id=<id>` on the final line

findings.problem: first non-comment line is not a ZYAL open sentinel
findings.agent_fix: keep the runbook envelope at the top of the file after optional comments

findings.problem: static mut exposes unsynchronized global mutation
findings.agent_fix: replace the mutable static with explicit synchronization or scoped ownership

findings.problem: fallback soup detected in product code
findings.agent_fix: collapse fallback chains into explicit typed states with bounded retry policy, telemetry, and documented repair guidance

findings.problem: future-hostile/dead-language term `deprecated` appears in product/runtime code
findings.agent_fix: remove or rename the marker, implement the intended behavior, model a typed unsupported state, or move docs/generated/vendor/product-copy text into an allowlisted context

findings.problem: human review or proof claim lacks reproducible evidence
findings.agent_fix: attach raw CI logs, review receipts, and replayable commands instead of accepting claims or summaries
findings.reason: proof and review claims need receipts

findings.problem: unsafe block lacks a nearby local safety argument
findings.agent_fix: add a precise `SAFETY:` comment or remove the unsafe block
findings.reason: no nearby SAFETY comment was found

findings.problem: product code contains TODO/stub/unimplemented/unreachable placeholder markers
findings.agent_fix: replace placeholders with implemented behavior, typed unsupported-state errors, or a tracked exception record with docs
